# Rosso Consulting — robots.txt
# Last updated: 2026

# All standard crawlers are welcome.
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/

# AI / LLM crawlers — explicitly permitted.
# We want our public content to be discoverable in AI-driven research,
# Q&A interfaces, and search experiences.

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Perplexity-User
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Bytespider
Allow: /

User-agent: Amazonbot
Allow: /

User-agent: cohere-ai
Allow: /

Allow: /

User-agent: FacebookBot
Allow: /
